title: Venithon Twins

{{Quote|In all my encounters with with ''[sic]'' the peace-loving Ithorian people, never have I come across a more non-Ithorian pair than these two.|[[Tirranna]]|<ref name="air" />}}
The '''Venithon Twins''' were two [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] operating in the [[Rebellion era]].

==History==
{{Quote|Why don't you join me? I know about you and what you've accomplished in the past. You'd make a strong addition to my group.|[[Safonne Pendon]], to [[Denuab Venithon|Denuab]] and [[Dorin Venithon]]|<ref name="air" />}}
[[Dorin Venithon]] and his brother [[Denuab Venithon]] were believed to be born in an [[Ithorian Herdship|Ithorian herdship]] traveling through [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] space. The twins somehow grew up in the slum docks of Corellia; probably the herd ship abandoned or lost them.<ref name="air" />

With a hard childhood, the Venithons became contrary to the Ithorian norm: They valued power and control instead of peace and life as Ithorian usually did. They felt no guilt depriving people from their possessions, dignity or life, and decided to become [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].<ref name="air" />

They bought a Ghtroc freighter to an [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] smuggler who had stolen it, with the original documents conveniently "lost". They then registered the ''[[Venithon Bandit]]'' under both of their names, and during the following years they refitted it with parts stolen to other, newer Ghtrocs: Only the original hull is left, but it was the only ship the Venithon Twins ever had.<ref name="air" />

The ship was usually piloted by Denuab, the most reasonable and educated of the two. Dorin performed the raiding, attacking the victims.<ref name="air" />

The Venithons served in different pirate organizations, such as the [[Kliap Pirates]], the [[Bandits of Ggy-ynt]], the [[Yarnak Gang]] and the [[Fivaran Organization]].<ref name="air" />

While serving the Fivaran Organization, they worked alongside other 46 pirates trying to ride the ''[[Hauler VI]]'', a ''Censian''-class transport. The Venithons then discovered that the cargo of the ''Hauler'' was 400 SpecForce Marines of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] army. The Venithons decided to escape, leaving their colleagues behind to be captured or killed.<ref name="air" />

They eventually began working for the [[Hy'thor Group|Hy'thor pirate group]], operating in [[Mieru'kar sector/Legends|Mieru'kar sector]] under the leadership of [[Ompiach]]. The Venithons served the leadership council, which in turn served Ompiach, but the Venithons unofficially had a great amount of power on the council individual members.<ref name="air" />

On [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Ompiach sent the Venithons as envoys to create a treaty among his group and a rival [[Pendon's pirates|group]] of pirates led by [[Safonne Pendon]]. Although they would rather raid ships, they accepted the task. Unfortunately, the meeting ended in a battle. During the battle, the crossfire damaged a Rebel freighter with an important cargo. The freighter crash-landed on a nearby planet and the Venithons and colleagues, trying to show their value, followed it to plunder it.<ref name="air" />

[[7 ABY/Legends|Five years later]], the Venithon Twins had changed sides and were part of Pendon's pirate gang.<ref name="wbc">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]</ref>
